behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths (registry.ts, plugin/index.ts), required exports (defaultLayer), APIs (Effect.fn, Effect.fnUntraced, Effect.forEach/all, Config.Service, Plugin.Service), and commands (bunx turbo typecheck, bun test test/tool/registry.test.ts) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and requirements (e.g., 'must yield services via Effect protocol') without prescribing specific line changes or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for general patterns (yield* Config.Service, Effect.fn/gen for all, Effect.forEach/all) rather than specific variable names; multiple valid refactorings would satisfy them.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run typecheck and bun test via subprocess, plus static checks on source code structure.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual refactoring (Effect.fn >= 3 uses, no Promise.all, yield* Service patterns) that a stub couldn't produce while passing repo_typecheck and registry tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 11 requirements in instruction.md has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived, Anti-stub, Repo CI/CD) with tag comments.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code refactoring, not structured data production.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands (bunx turbo typecheck, Effect.fnUntraced) are consistent and spelled correctly.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files being refactored (which is appropriate as the task is refactoring, not localization) without pointing to specific buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code refactoring task, not an agentmd-edit task.
